caption: A man with bleached blonde, styled hair, glasses, and over-ear headphones is seated in a studio setting, appearing to record a podcast. He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with gold suspenders and a patterned red bow tie. In front of him is a black professional microphone on a stand. Behind him, a woman in a green dress is partially visible, and the wall features a poster with the text "UNIQUE FASHION" and a framed logo of a gold shield. On-screen graphics appear in the lower corners: a logo on the left says "#BESTTALK PODCAST" and text on the right reads "BEST TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, looking slightly to the side and speaking, with subtle changes in his facial expression and head tilt as he talks.
